summary: Mixed-quality artifact recording featuring fantastic Dead playing and a polarizing Joan Baez cameo.
review: The reviewer praises the band's performance as fantastic but notes that the recording is an historical artifact of uncertain fidelity. While Jerry, Bob, Phil, Brent and Mickey are mentioned positively, the presence of Joan Baez draws mixed reactions. Overall the show feels like a typical Dead set—neither a high point nor a low point—but the audio quality limits its appeal.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one 3‑star review is available; it lauds the playing but calls the recording an artifact, leading to an overall moderate rating with low confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No explicit source (soundboard/audience) is identified. Reviewer describes the tape as an 'artifact' and implies average sound quality without specific issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Described as a standard Dead performance—solid and expected, with no particular flow or transition highlights mentioned.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Solid performance noted; reviewer highlights his presence in the set.
band_member_comments.Bob: Mentioned as part of the group effort, but no specific comment on his guitar work.
band_member_comments.Keys: Brent (keys) is referenced positively as part of the ensemble.
band_member_comments.Drums: Mickey's drumming is mentioned favorably in passing.
